title: WordPress Theme Customization
description: Admin previews, adjusts settings, and publishes theme customizations via the Customizer (WP_Customize_Manager)
use_cases: Preview Theme in iframe (customize_preview_init → filter_iframe_security_headers → customize_preview_settings)
Switch Theme Preview (setup_theme checks switch_themes cap → start_previewing_theme)
Save Changeset as Draft (save → save_changeset_post with status=draft)
Save Changeset as Pending Review (save → save_changeset_post with status=pending)
Schedule Changeset (save → save_changeset_post with status=future + date_gmt)
Autosave Changeset (save with autosave flag → save_changeset_post with autosave=true)
Manage Changeset Lock via Heartbeat (check_changeset_lock_with_heartbeat → set_changeset_lock)
Set Live Preview URL (set_preview_url → get_preview_url → is_cross_domain check)
Publish Changeset Values to DB (_publish_changeset_values → iterates theme_mod settings → apply per-user)
key_methods: __construct($args): registers AJAX hooks, action hooks, and loads components (widgets, nav_menus, selective_refresh)
setup_theme(): checks 'customize' capability, validates UUID, verifies CSRF nonce, calls start_previewing_theme()
establish_loaded_changeset(): resolves which changeset UUID to load (respects branching flag)
start_previewing_theme() / stop_previewing_theme(): toggles $previewing state, fires hooks
customize_preview_init(): enqueues preview scripts, sets nocache headers, calls prepare_controls()
save(): AJAX handler — validates nonce/caps, reads POST data, calls save_changeset_post()
save_changeset_post($args): persists changeset CPT (customize_changeset) with status/title/date/data
_publish_changeset_values($post_id): reads changeset post, iterates settings, calls WP_Customize_Setting::save()
add_setting($id, $args): factory for WP_Customize_Setting (or subclass via filters)
add_dynamic_settings($ids): wake-up settings from POST data not statically registered
validate_setting_values($values): runs per-setting sanitize/validate callbacks, returns validity map
add_panel / add_section / add_control: register UI hierarchy elements
register_controls(): registers default panels (Themes, Site Identity, Colors, Header, Background, Menus, Widgets, Homepage, CSS)
handle_changeset_trash_request(): moves changeset post to trash via AJAX
handle_load_themes_request(): searches/paginates themes for the themes panel via AJAX
prepare_controls(): sorts and filters panels/sections/controls for rendering
customize_pane_settings(): exports all settings/controls/sections/panels to JS _wpCustomizeSettings
key_relationships: Changeset stored as CPT customize_changeset (post_name = UUID, post_content = JSON settings)
save() triggers _publish_changeset_values() indirectly via transition_post_status hook on publish
permissions_and_guards: customize capability: required to open Customizer and save settings
switch_themes capability: required to preview/switch themes
install_themes capability: required to browse WordPress.org themes
CSRF nonce checked: preview-customize_{stylesheet} or save-customize_{stylesheet}
Changeset lock: prevents concurrent edits; auto-forces autosave if locked
UUID validation: wp_is_uuid() checked in setup_theme()
important_notes: Changeset is stored as a custom post type (customize_changeset) with UUID as post_name and JSON-encoded settings as post_content. Statuses: auto-draft → draft/pending → publish/future/trash. Branching flag controls whether concurrent changesets are allowed. Preview runs in an iframe with SAMEORIGIN X-Frame-Options. Starter content is auto-imported on fresh WordPress installs.
